title: feat: Engineering Memory OS MVP — git-native reasoning graph over the codebase
context:
Implements DESIGN.md: a persistent "Project Hunch" that captures *why* the code
is the way it is (decisions, bug lineage, invariants) and feeds it to Claude Code
at reasoning time.

Components:
- store/      JSON source-of-truth <-> SQLite/FTS5 index; recursive-CTE blast radius
- extractors/ native tree-sitter symbol/call/import graph; git introspection
- synthesis/  pluggable LLM provider (anthropic-sdk | claude-cli | deterministic)
- mcp/        stdio MCP server: hunch_query/why/bug_lineage/ch
decision: Introduced code in src/cli, src/core, src/extractors, src/integrations, src/mcp, src/store (26 file(s)).
